env_files.role: Latest campaign update with authoritative copy, replacements, and priority order
Current platform size, safe-area, hierarchy, contrast, and placement constraints
Current palette, design rules, hero requirements, style constraints, and conditional rules
Allowed current logo, hero, icon, badge, or helper assets
Deprecated copy, colors, claims, logos, templates, and plausible wrong assets that must not be active
Compact admissions brand context replacing duplicate archive PDF material

source_policy.web_usage_note: Closed-env case: solve only from env files and task.md; do not use the web.

notes: Lightly optimized design-specification case with compact env, latest event update priority, Instagram Story constraints, current palette resolution, allowed assets, and deprecated admissions exclusions.
